code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let parsed = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  let parsed = match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
for x in nums
  if has_prev and x == prev
    # skip
  else
    result = list.push(result, x)
    prev = x
    has_prev = true
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in result
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
